title: Gaffer Tape Black- 50mm x 50m - Strong Duct Tape Heavy Duty Adhesive Cloth Repair Tape, Super Sticky And Waterproof Gaffer Tape| Adhesive Tape Multi-Use for Indoor/Outdoor (24, Brown, 48mmx66m)
features: ✅ HEAVY DUTY GAFFER TAPE – Strong and reliable black gaffer tape made from durable cloth material with a powerful adhesive for maximum hold.
✅ SUPER STICKY & WATERPROOF – Provides excellent adhesion on different surfaces, designed to withstand moisture, outdoor conditions, and tough environments.
✅ DIMENSIONS & PACK SIZE – Roll size: 50mm width x 50m length, supplied as a Pack of 1, perfect for long-lasting use.
✅ EASY TO TEAR BY HAND – No need for scissors; this duct tape can be torn cleanly by hand while still offering high strength and flexibility.
✅ MULTI-PURPOSE USE – Ideal for DIY repairs, sealing boxes, securing cables, stage and theatre work, construction jobs, and everyday household fixes.
✅ INDOOR & OUTDOOR PERFORMANCE – Weather-resistant tape suitable for use in the home, garden, office, workshop, or on construction sites.
description: Product Description Strong Adhesive Hold Provides a firm grip on various surfaces, ensuring long-lasting and reliable bonding. Multi-Purpose Use Ideal for packaging, repairs, crafting, and everyday household tasks. Easy to Use & Cut Designed for smooth application and simple tearing or cutting without hassle. Durable & Long-Lasting Made with high-quality material that resists wear, ensuring extended usability.
